title: A Playful Production Process
creator: Richard Lemarchand
description: A start-to-finish production framework connecting concept development, prototypes, playtesting, iteration, teamwork, and sustainable scheduling.
useful: A practical overview for students and small teams that explicitly argues against uncontrolled crunch.
audience: Students, new producers, and small teams planning a complete project without relying on crunch.
learning: Move from concept to prototype and production
Plan playtesting and iteration throughout a project
Build healthier schedules and team practices
